Super Individual (超级个体) mentor, holder of multiple patents, and inventor of innovative products.

[[BLOCK:p_16]]
One of the leading experts in experience design and System Growth Marketing (系统增长营销) in China, founder of Life State Design (生命状态设计).

[[BLOCK:p_17]]
Pioneer of the Heaven-Human-Earth Three Paths Destiny Adjustment Philosophy (天人地三道改运理念), originator of the Life Design Blueprint (人生设计图谱) concept, and creator of the Heart Imagery Art Therapy (心象艺术疗愈) philosophy.
